TOKENATTACHER.error.NoAttachments: This token has no attached objects.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoMatchingAttachment: None of the selected objects are attached to this token.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoCopiedAttachments: No copied attachments are available to paste.
TOKENATTACHER.error.InvalidCopiedAttachm: The copied attachment data is invalid and cannot be pasted.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoEligibleAttachedSe: None of the selected attached objects can be changed by this action.
TOKENATTACHER.error.ObjectsAttachedElsew: {count} selected object(s) were skipped because they are attached to another base.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoElementsInRectangl: No attachable objects were found in the selected area.
TOKENATTACHER.error.CreationPrevented: Another module prevented the attached objects from being created.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoActorsToMigrate: No actors with Token Attacher prototype data were found.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoCompendiumsToMigra: No unlocked Actor compendiums are available to migrate.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoTokenAttacherData: This scene contains no Token Attacher data.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoActiveScene: No active scene is available for this action.
TOKENATTACHER.error.QuickEditGMOnly: Only a GM can use Token Attacher Quick Edit Mode.
TOKENATTACHER.error.ImportFolderMissingP: Imported folder {folder} references missing parent folder {parent}.
TOKENATTACHER.error.ImportFolderCycle: The imported folder structure contains a parent cycle involving {folder}.
TOKENATTACHER.error.AttachmentParentMiss: This attached object's parent ({parent}) no longer exists. Detach or repair the stale attachment before moving it.
TOKENATTACHER.error.AttachedObjectMoveme: This object is attached and cannot be moved directly. Use Token Attacher's attachment controls or Quick Edit Mode.
TOKENATTACHER.error.NoActiveGMFound: No active GM found! Attached objects were not correctly updated. Please move your token to the previous location and contact your GM.
TOKENATTACHER.error.ExportAllowsOnlyActo: Only Actor compendiums are allowed to export via Token Attacher!
TOKENATTACHER.error.ElementAlreadyAttach: Element already in chain of attachments. See console for more details.
TOKENATTACHER.error.ActorDataModelNeedsM: Token uses old data model. Please migrate it via 'Token Attacher GM Menu' in 'Module Settings' and try again!
TOKENATTACHER.error.MigrationErrorScene: Migration error on scene {scene}. See console for more informations.
TOKENATTACHER.error.QuickEditNotFinished: Token Attacher Quick Edit Mode was not ended and auto save didn't finish. Your last changes won't be saved.
TOKENATTACHER.error.PostProcessingNotFin: Token Attacher's Post Processing is not finished. If you switched the scene before then you need to use the (TA)Delete missing Links Macro.
TOKENATTACHER.error.OnlyTokenToggleAnima: Only Token Animation can be changed.
TOKENATTACHER.error.BaseDoesntExist: The attaching UI is open for a base that doesn't exist anymore. The UI was closed. Reopen the attaching UI for an existing base!
TOKENATTACHER.error.UIisOpenOnAssign: The attaching UI is still open for a base. There is no guarantee that your changes have been saved properly. Close the attaching UI and assign the token again!
TOKENATTACHER.info.QuickEditEnabled: Token Attacher Quick Edit Mode enabled.
TOKENATTACHER.info.QuickEditDisabled: Token Attacher Quick Edit Mode disabled.
TOKENATTACHER.info.PurgeComplete: Token Attacher data was removed from the scene.
TOKENATTACHER.info.SelectionSaved: Selected objects saved for future attaching.
TOKENATTACHER.info.MigrationInProgress: Data migration to {version} in progress. This will take some time and open all your scenes. Please be patient.
TOKENATTACHER.info.DataModelMergedTo: Data migration finished. New data model version: {version}
TOKENATTACHER.info.DragSelectElements: Use layer select tool to select elements on all layers to attach now!
TOKENATTACHER.info.PostProcessingFinishe: Token Atacher's Post Processing is finished. You can use the prefab now.
TOKENATTACHER.info.PastedAndAttached: Pasted elements. Please wait for post processing to finish...
TOKENATTACHER.info.ImportingJSONStart: Token Attacher - Starting JSON Import for {name}. Please be patient and wait for the finish message.
TOKENATTACHER.info.ImportingJSONFinished: Token Attacher - Finished JSON Import for {name}. If you're not seeing the imported compendium press F5.
TOKENATTACHER.confirm.DetachAllContent: Detach every object attached to this token? This cannot be undone.
TOKENATTACHER.confirm.ResetMigrationCont: Reset the Token Attacher data-model version and restart automatic migration?
TOKENATTACHER.confirm.PurgeSceneContent: Remove all Token Attacher data from this scene? This cannot be undone.
TOKENATTACHER.button.select: Select tool for attaching elements on all layers
TOKENATTACHER.button.gmMenu.CompendiumsM: Migrate all Actor Compendiums that have attached Elements
TOKENATTACHER.button.gmMenu.ExportActors: Open Export Actors to JSON Dialog
TOKENATTACHER.button.gmMenu.ResetMigrati: Reset Datamodel and force restart automatic Migration
TOKENATTACHER.button.gmMenu.PurgeTADataI: Remove all Token Attacher data in Scene
TOKENATTACHER.setting.MLTBlockMovement: Prevent movement by MLT/V&M on token bases
TOKENATTACHER.setting.MLTBlockMovementHi: When a Token has a Vehicles drawing that captures Tokens(auto or manual) somewhere attached, this setting will prevent that token from being moved by anything related to Multi Level Tokens/Vehicles & Mechanisms.
